reasoning: I know Biswajit Das switched parties like he was shopping, and I know TMC is full of corruption and defections that make me angry. But when I stand here, what matters is this: the BJP made the CAA, and that law was designed to leave people like me out. Mamata stood against it. My Swasthya Sathi card works under her government — that's the only real thing I can hold onto. Shantanu Thakur being renominated just reminds me again that the BJP sees certain people as their people, and I'm not one of them. I'm voting for the card that works and the leader who didn't write a law that tells me I don't belong.
primary_drivers: CAA excludes Muslims by design; Mamata opposed it, BJP made it
Swasthya Sathi card — only concrete government benefit I've felt reach my home
Fear of what BJP's religious positioning means for my place in Bengal
